clearFlag(string,uint8).notice: Regulator clears a false-positive counterfeit flag.

flagCounterfeit(string,string).notice: Flag a batch as potentially counterfeit.         Any registered user can flag — regulators investigate.

getStageHistory(string).notice: Returns the full stage history for a batch.         Powers the supply chain timeline UI on the website.

markAsSold(string,uint256).notice: Sell the drug to a patient.         Requires a valid, unexpired prescription.         Calls PrescriptionAndDiagnosis.dispensePrescription() to close the loop.

receiveAtPharmacy(string).notice: Pharmacy confirms receipt of the batch.         Only callable by wallets with PHARMACIST_ROLE.         Batch must be InTransit and pharmacy must be the current owner.

registerDrug(string,string).notice: Register a new drug batch on-chain.         Only callable by wallets with MANUFACTURER_ROLE.

transferToDistributor(string,address).notice: Transfer batch to a distributor.         Only the current owner (manufacturer) can call this.         Recipient must hold DISTRIBUTOR_ROLE.

verifyDrug(string).notice: Public drug verification — anyone can call this.         Used by the QR code scanner on the website.

userdoc.notice: Tracks drug batches from manufacturer to patient with role-enforced         stage transitions and cross-contract prescription validation at         the point of sale. CHANGES FROM v1:  - CRITICAL FIX: each stage transition now enforces the correct role    (only DISTRIBUTOR can set InTransit, only PHARMACY can set AtPharmacy)  - AtPharmacy stage was missing entirely — receiveAtPharmacy() added  - markAsSold() now validates a valid prescription exists via    IPrescriptionAndDiagnosis.isValidPrescription() AND calls    dispensePrescription() to close the loop  - flagCounterfeit() + CounterfeitFlagged event added  - Full stage history array per batch (audit trail for the panel demo)  - AccessControl interface replaces ad-hoc role mappings  - ReentrancyGuard on all state-changing functions

documentation.text:
@title  DrugAuthenticity
 @notice Tracks drug batches from manufacturer to patient with role-enforced
         stage transitions and cross-contract prescription validation at
         the point of sale.
 CHANGES FROM v1:
  - CRITICAL FIX: each stage transition now enforces the correct role
    (only DISTRIBUTOR can set InTransit, only PHARMACY can set AtPharmacy)
  - AtPharmacy stage was missing entirely — receiveAtPharmacy() added
  - markAsSold() now validates a valid prescription exists via
    IPrescriptionAndDiagnosis.isValidPrescription() AND calls
    dispensePrescription() to close the loop
  - flagCounterfeit() + CounterfeitFlagged event added
  - Full stage history array per batch (audit trail for the panel demo)
  - AccessControl interface replaces ad-hoc role mappings
  - ReentrancyGuard on all state-changing functions
